verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, little town of Bethlehem, How still we see thee lie, Yet in the midst of such serenity I hear a tiny Baby cry; He didn't choose to come Where the cantata sang With prophecies about His birth, But in the shadows Of those stained-glass walls, Our Savior came to earth.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: 'Cause great things often come from silent nights, He chose a quiet, simple stable Instead of glitter, noise and lights, Oh, Lord, help us just to pull away from all the busyness of life; 'Cause great things often come from silent nights.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Still waters run deep, So I've heard it told; But in this world of noise and hurry I see a shallowness unfold, We need to make the time to spend some quiet time alone with Christ, 'Cause that's the only way His Word can bring forth, Great things from our lives.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh silent nights, oh holy nights, Wandering star, now led by Light; They that wait upon the Lord shall renew their strength, So be still my soul and know that He is God.
